zh-HK: 修正語言切換狀態未同步：<html lang> 屬性、JavaScript lang 變數、localStorage 三者統一
切換英文後重整頁面依然保持英文（之前永遠 fallback 回中文）
修復 PDF 匯出 / customerType / i18n fallback 等 7 處讀 document.documentElement.lang 永遠回傳 zh 嘅 silent bug
en: Sync language state: <html lang>, JS lang variable, and localStorage are now unified
English selection now persists across page reloads (previously always reverted to Chinese)
Fix 7 silent state-desync sites reading document.documentElement.lang (PDF export, customerType, i18n fallback, etc.)
